incident: Unlimited token approval: approve() or increaseAllowance() called with amount >= 2^255
label: H1_positive

incident: Unlimited token approval: EIP-2612 permit() or Permit2 signed with unlimited amount
label: H1_positive

incident: Unlimited token approval: User followed recommendation -- Set approval to exact amount needed for this transaction, not unlimited
label: H1_clean

incident: Unverified spender contract: Spender contract source code not verified on block explorer

incident: Unverified spender contract: Spender contract deployed within last 24 hours
label: H2_positive

incident: Unverified spender contract: Spender not found in any known protocol registry (DeFi Llama, Etherscan labels)

incident: Known scam address: Address found in scam/phishing database with confirmed reports

incident: Suspicious function selector: Function selector not found in 4byte.directory or common interface databases

incident: Suspicious function selector: Multicall/batch that includes hidden approval among other operations

incident: Suspicious function selector: ERC-721/1155 setApprovalForAll to unknown operator

incident: Suspicious function selector: User followed recommendation -- Decode the calldata and show the user exactly what operations will execute
